subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath manifested Himself amidst the nations and through Whom the horizon of the world hath been illumined, yet most among men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر نفسه بین الامم و به انار افق العالم ولکن الناس اکثرهم من
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @chastisement and requital, @knowledge; recognition of God
